Businesses For Sale1,500+ results

Buy or Sell a Business on BizBuySell

The market for buying and selling privately owned small businesses is thriving, with tens of thousands of businesses for sale at any one time. This unique marketplace is the crossroads where exiting business owners meet entrepreneurs looking to take the reins of a business venture.

  

Where Boring Businesses Live

The term "boring business" may be new to some, but it's been the core of BizBuySell's marketplace for almost thirty years. Established, successful, and profitable businesses are less likely to be some flashy tech company, but more often the businesses we encounter on a day-to-day basis, from service and construction to restaurants and gas stations. The most profitable types of businesses remain those that are necessary for society to function.

If you're new to this market, sign up now and get access to free features to help you get acquainted and navigate this large marketplace. If you haven't nailed down a category yet, try starting with financial or lifestyle criteria to find inspiration. Here are our favorites:

Profit Potential: Most Profitable Types of Businesses

Passive Income: Absentee Businesses

Baby Boomers: Businesses for Sale by Retiring Owners

Established Systems: Franchise Opportunities

  

Where Business Owners Make Their Exit

If you are considering selling a business, you've come to the right place. BizBuySell has a wealth of information, free tools, and resources to help you get up to speed and build an exit plan.

Get the Free Book: Guide to Selling Your Business

Get Professional Help: Find a Business Broker

Get Your Listing Started: Sell a Business

Get Informed: How to Sell a Business Learning Center
